# Vendored XP.css

- `XP.css` — from the npm package [`xp.css`](https://www.npmjs.com/package/xp.css)
  v0.2.6 (`dist/XP.css`), MIT licensed. Project: https://botoxparty.github.io/XP.css/
- `ms_sans_serif*.woff(2)` — the "Pixelated MS Sans Serif" webfont that XP.css
  references, taken from the npm package [`98.css`](https://www.npmjs.com/package/98.css)
  (`dist/`), MIT licensed.

These are vendored (rather than loaded from a CDN) so the GitHub Pages site has
no external runtime dependencies. To update, pull the same files from the
respective npm package tarballs.
